goal: Transform the legacy LogDrawer.tsx into a premium V9 'History of Contention' (争鸣史) experience with concertina folding layout and mineral-style icons.
constraints: Use only V9 palette: Ivory, Ink, Vermilion, Stone Green.
deliverables: Refactored LogDrawer.tsx with V9 Yahua visual system.
Integrated 6 custom mineral-style icons into the project assets.
Responsive and animated scroll-like log display.
